description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features large windows and a double-door entryway, flanked by manicured shrubs and a paved driveway. The exterior combines white and dark blue-gray wall finishes, with the rear and side elevations showcasing expansive glass doors and windows that open to a private backyard. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor seating, green lawns, and ornamental trees, all enclosed by a wooden fence. The house has a rooftop terrace and multiple access points to the outdoor spaces, emphasizing indoor-outdoor living. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with an emphasis on open, light-filled spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and blue-gray exterior walls, surrounded by a fenced yard with patios and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, double doors, large windows, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long blue-gray wall, backyard patio with seating, and two ornamental trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass doors, a fenced backyard, and a green lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mix of window sizes, side garden, and the continuation of the wooden fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door main entry with large glass panels, minimal steps, and landscaped approach
